summary: Well-organized unit test suite with comprehensive function-level coverage (parse_version, parse_commit_type, bump_version, process_commits, generate_changelog, update_version_file) and good fixture organization. However, critical gaps exist: (1) main() CLI function is completely untested—no tests for argument parsing, stdin reading, or exit codes; (2) no end-to-end integration test validating the complete workflow from file parsing through version update and changelog generation; (3) missing test for JSON decoding errors (caught in code but untested); (4) no multiline commit message testing in changelog generation; (5) no stdin reading scenario. The tests would catch function-level regressions but would miss integration bugs and CLI interface issues. Test design is clean with logical class grouping and clear fixture names, but lacks a final integration test class that exercises the full pipeline in one scenario.
